name: Star Wars: Fantasy Flight Games - Dice Roller
description:
This is the Fantasy Flight Games Star Wars Role Playing Game Dice Roller. It is used in combination with the Star Wars FFG API-Compatible Character Sheet.

**Version 2.6** - Compatible with Depreciated Star Wars - Edge of the Empire (API-Compatible) Character Sheet
**Version 3.0** - Compatible with Depreciated Star Wars - Edge of the Empire (API-Compatible) Character Sheet - Added Destiny Rolls
**Version 4.0.2.17** - Compatible with Depreciated Star Wars - Edge of the Empire (API-Compatible) Character Sheet - Added code cleanup and Character Sheet Auto Creator
**Version 4.0.4.2** - Not Compatible with Depreciated Star Wars - Edge of the Empire (API-Compatible) Character Sheet - Needs to use 4.0.4.0 or higher to utilize. - Added Roll Templates
**Version 6.3.0** - Added Skill Roll Suggestion Engine, NPC Sheet, collapsible sections, and much more
**Version 6.4.3** - Updated dice icons for UK users.
**Version 6.4.4** - Replaced broken imgbox dice URLs with direct links to the dice images already stored in this repository.

Supports dice rolling with graphics, Destiny Point Tracking, Critical Injury/Hit Rolls, Over Encumbrance auto setback adding, Skill Rolls, Opposed Rolls, Initiative Rolls, Auto Character Sheet creation, and Debugging.

**API Commands:**
**!eed g# y# b# blk# r# p# w# or g#+# or g#-#** - Rolls Dice
**!eed CharacterID(character) destiny RegisterPlayer** - Syncs Destiny Pool to what is listed on the GM's sheet (typically only done by players).
**!eed characterID(character) 1w destiny doRoll** - Roll a Destiny Point
**!eed characterID(character) destiny useLight** - Use a Light Side Destiny Point
**!eed characterID(character) destiny sendUpdate** - Force the Players to update their Destiny Point display (typically only done by the GM).
**!eed characterID(character) destiny clearPool** - Clear the Destiny Pool
**!eed characterID(character) destiny useDark** - Use a Dark Side Destiny Point
**!eed resetdice characterID** - Reset Dice in the Dice Pool
**crit(roll) crit(roll|#) crit(heal|#)** - Apply a Critical Injury - Added to !eed dice rolls
**critShip(roll) critShip(roll|#) critShip(heal|#)** - Apply a Critical Hit - Added to !eed dice rolls
**encum(encum_current|encum_threshold)** - Check if over encumberance threshold - Added to !eed dice rolls
**skill(char_value|skill_value)** - Roll a Skill - Added to !eed dice rolls
**opposed(char_value|skill_value)** - Roll an Opposed check - Added to !eed dice rolls
**!eed log on|off|multi|single** - Logging Options
**!eed graphics on|off|s|m|l** - Graphics Options
**!eed test** - Test 1 of each die.
**!eed debug on|off** - Debug mode.
**label(Name of Skill)** - Label a skill roll.
**npcinit or pcinit and #b #g #y #blk #p #r #w** - Roll an Initiative Check. - Added to !eed dice rolls
**upgrade(ability|#) or upgrade(difficulty|#)** - Upgrade the ability or Difficulty of a check. - Added to !eed dice rolls
**downgrade(proficiency|#) or downgrade(challenge|#)** - Downgrade the ability or Difficulty of a check. - Added to !eed dice rolls
**!charsheet** - Create a blank Character Sheet.
authors: Konrad J.,Steve Day, Arron, Andrew H., Tom F., Akashan, GM Knowledge Rhino,Tim P., Hannah Eliz, Flo Wild, kayochao
